description: Picks up a specific object by name. Automatically handles path planning and obstacle removal.

constraints.target_obj_name: Must be a valid object name in the simulation (e.g., 'Cube 1', 'Red Cube').

description: Places the currently held object. If 'destination_obj_name' is provided, places ON TOP of that object. If not, places at 'destination_coords'.
Places the object NEAR the target or coordinates, ensuring it does not stack on top of anything. Useful for organizing items.
Moves the robot arm to its safe home position.
Checks if the gripper is holding an object and releases it if necessary. Ensures the gripper is empty and ready for a new task.
Pours liquid from the currently held object INTO the specified target object (destination).

constraints.target_obj_name: Must be the name of the destination container (e.g., 'Beaker'). The robot must already be holding the source container.

description: Shakes the specified held object back and forth to mix contents.

constraints.target_obj_name: Must be the name of the object currently held by the gripper.

function_signature: swirl(target_obj_name: str, count: int = 5, radius: int = 20, speed: int = 1000)
description: Swirls the specified held object in a horizontal circle to mix contents gently.

constraints.target_obj_name: Must be the name of the object currently held by the gripper.

description: Places the currently held object within a specified rectangular area.

constraints.area_bounds: Must be a dictionary with 'min_x', 'max_x', 'min_y', 'max_y' keys defining the rectangular bounds.

description: Pauses execution for the specified number of seconds.

constraints.seconds: Must be a positive number representing the duration in seconds.
